name: Eden
oracleText:
({T}: Add {G}.)
Eden, Garden of Delight enters the battlefield tapped.
When Eden enters the battlefield, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a legendary spell.
flavorText: "And the Lord God planted a garden eastward in Eden; and there he put the man whom he had formed." — Genesis 2:8
notes: Early World major location card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for The Garden of Eden (MET DP159806).
title: Garden of Delight
